languages.text: "Я знако{mf|м|ма} с вашим далеким потомком. Он совсем не похож на вас".
"I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."
languages.original_text: "Я знако{mf|м|ма} с вашим далеким потомком. Он совсем не похож на вас".

traits.locale_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."
"I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."
"I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

languages.text: “我跟你的一个远房后代很熟。他可一点都不像你。”
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: “我跟你的一个远房后代很熟。他可一点都不像你。”

languages.text: « J'ai déjà rencontré votre lointain descendant. Il ne vous ressemble pas du tout. »
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai déjà rencontré votre lointain descendant. Il ne vous ressemble pas du tout. »

languages.text: "Uzak soydaşını tanıyorum. Seninle uzaktan yakından alakası yok."
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: "Uzak soydaşını tanıyorum. Seninle uzaktan yakından alakası yok."

languages.text: «Conozco a un descendiente lejano suyo. No se parece en nada a usted».
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: «Conozco a un descendiente lejano suyo. No se parece en nada a usted».

languages.text: "Ich kenne Euren entfernten Nachkommen. Er ist ganz anders als Ihr."
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kenne Euren entfernten Nachkommen. Er ist ganz anders als Ihr."

languages.text: 「あなたの遠い子孫を知っています。彼はあなたとは全く違います。」
languages.original_text: "I am acquainted with your distant descendant. He is nothing like you."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの遠い子孫を知っています。彼はあなたとは全く違います。」
